name: squad
description: Operating loop for AI coding agents: atomic claims, typed chat, evidence-gated done, mandatory review, multi-agent coordination.

requires.install_hint: Install the squad CLI from https://github.com/zsiec/squad/releases or via 'go install github.com/zsiec/squad/cmd/squad@latest'.

post_install.message: squad plugin installed. Run 'squad install-plugin --register-mcp' once to wire the MCP server into Claude Code, or restart Claude Code to pick up the .mcp.json automatically.
